name: BLT Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, crumbled bacon, mayonnaise, and pepper. Mix well.
2. Place one warm tortilla on a clean surface.
3. Spoon the mixture down the center of the tortilla.
4. Fold the sides over the filling.
5. Roll up the tortilla from both ends to enclose the filling completely.
6. Serve immediately.
